job_description.responsibilities_text: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models for production systems. Collaborate with data engineers to build robust ML pipelines. Optimize model performance and monitor production model drift.
job_description.qualifications_text: Strong background in Python and deep learning frameworks. Experience deploying models with Docker and cloud infrastructure such as AWS.

candidates.summary_text: Backend and ML developer with 2 years of experience in Python services and containerization. Some exposure to TensorFlow-based model training.
Junior developer with one year of experience in Java application support.
ML engineer with 4 years building and deploying deep learning models on AWS. Experienced with PyTorch and containerized deployment pipelines using Docker.
Full-stack ML engineer with 4 years deploying PyTorch models to AWS using Docker and Kubernetes. Comfortable across both Python and Java codebases.
Cloud infrastructure engineer with strong AWS and Kubernetes experience. Background in Java backend systems and DevOps automation.
